proof_boundary: Claim-classification ledger only; not a proof of PF-infinity, Laguerre-Polya membership, RH, or Lambda <= 0.

claims.title: de Bruijn-Newman heat equation identity
claims.claim: The de Bruijn-Newman family satisfies partial_lambda H_lambda = -partial_zz H_lambda.
claims.proof_boundary: Exact identity used as background; not by itself a proof of Lambda <= 0.

claims.title: signed-Hankel finite certificate grid
claims.claim: The promoted five-lambda grid m=0..19, shifts=0..24 validates 2500 signed-Hankel finite certificates.
claims.proof_boundary: Finite determinant certificate only; not an all-order signed-Hankel theorem and not a proof of RH or Lambda <= 0.

claims.title: ordinary Taylor coefficient Toeplitz/PF finite certificates
claims.claim: The corrected ordinary Taylor sequence c_k=A_k/k! has 95 promoted positive Toeplitz/PF certificate summaries and one beta negative control in the manifest.
claims.proof_boundary: Finite coefficient-PF evidence only; it does not prove PF-infinity.

claims.title: Toeplitz-to-skew-Schur Jacobi-Trudi reindexing
claims.claim: Structurally nonzero upper-triangular Toeplitz minors of d_k=c_k/c_0 map exactly to Jacobi-Trudi skew-Schur evaluations.
claims.proof_boundary: Exact algebraic translation only; it does not prove Schur positivity.

claims.title: reshaped Hankel sign-consistency point audit
claims.claim: The exact-rationalized cache point audit validates 20 finite reshaped Hankel sign-consistency rows for the five-lambda grid, orders k=2..5, and N=18.
claims.proof_boundary: Finite point diagnostic only; not an interval certificate, not all-order sign consistency, and not a proof of Jensen hyperbolicity, RH, or Lambda <= 0.

claims.title: Arb reshaped Hankel sign-consistency finite certificates
claims.claim: Using rigorous A_ball coefficient enclosures, the Arb manifest validates 689,795 finite reshaped-Hankel sign-consistency minors for the five-lambda grid, orders k=2..7, and N=20.
claims.proof_boundary: Finite interval certificate only; not all-order sign consistency, not a Jensen hyperbolicity theorem, and not a proof of RH or Lambda <= 0.

claims.title: shifted Arb reshaped Hankel sign-consistency finite certificates
claims.claim: Using rigorous A_ball coefficient enclosures, the shifted Arb staircase manifest validates 3,154,515 finite reshaped-Hankel sign-consistency minors for the five-lambda grid and shifts n=0..20: orders k=2..5 at N=18, k=6 at N=16, k=7 at N=15, and k=8 at N=14.
claims.proof_boundary: Finite shifted interval certificate only; not all-shift or all-order sign consistency, not a Jensen hyperbolicity theorem, and not a proof of RH or Lambda <= 0.

claims.title: Jensen/Hankel bridge algebra and finite countermodel gate
claims.claim: Degree-2 Jensen hyperbolicity is exactly the m=1 signed-Hankel condition, but a positive rational sequence passes finite reshaped-Hankel signs for k=2,3 at N=3 while its degree-3 Jensen discriminant is negative.
claims.proof_boundary: Exact low-degree algebra and finite countermodel only; not an all-order sign-consistency-to-Jensen theorem.

claims.title: Jensen-window PF low-degree obligation algebra
claims.claim: Degree-2 Jensen-window PF has exact signed-Hankel contact, while degree-3 and degree-4 introduce additional banded Toeplitz obligations; the positive rational countermodel passes selected low-order window minors but has negative larger contiguous Toeplitz minors.
claims.proof_boundary: Exact low-degree theorem-search algebra and finite countermodel only; not a proof of Jensen-window PF-infinity or Lambda <= 0.

claims.title: Arb Jensen-window PF selected obligation finite diagnostic
claims.claim: Using rigorous A_ball coefficient enclosures, the manifest validates 1,470 selected degree-3 and degree-4 Jensen-window contiguous Toeplitz determinants for the five-lambda grid and shifts n=0..20.
claims.proof_boundary: Finite Arb diagnostic only; not all-minor Jensen-window PF-infinity, not Jensen hyperbolicity, and not a proof of RH or Lambda <= 0.

claims.title: Arb Jensen-window Sturm hyperbolicity finite diagnostic
claims.claim: Using rigorous A_ball coefficient enclosures and an Arb/Sturm-style sign-variation computation, the manifest validates 210 degree-3 and degree-4 Jensen-window positive-root counts for the five-lambda grid and shifts n=0..20.
claims.proof_boundary: Finite Arb/Sturm diagnostic only; not all-degree or all-shift Jensen hyperbolicity, not Jensen-window PF-infinity, and not a proof of RH or Lambda <= 0.

claims.title: Edrei-log sign diagnostic
claims.claim: The manifest validates 320 finite Edrei-log sign diagnostics across the five-lambda grid.
claims.proof_boundary: Finite necessary-condition diagnostic; not PF-infinity, Laguerre-Polya membership, RH, or Lambda <= 0.

claims.title: Edrei power-Hankel finite diagnostic
claims.claim: The manifest validates 4205 finite Edrei power-Hankel diagnostics.
claims.proof_boundary: Finite necessary-condition diagnostic; it does not give the all-order Edrei representation.

claims.title: Edrei shifted-moment recurrence scout
claims.claim: Arb recurrence rows are positive through orders 2..12 and interval-inconclusive, not negative, from order 13 through 20.
claims.proof_boundary: Finite constructive diagnostic only; not an all-order moment representation.

claims.title: countermodel and finite-prefix proof-safety gates
claims.claim: The executable gate validates local heat-birth, finite-prefix, finite Schur-prefix, finite consecutive signed-Hankel grid, finite recurrence, and Stieltjes multiplier traps.
claims.proof_boundary: Proof-safety countermodels only; not claims about actual zeta coefficients.

claims.title: Theorem Target B: signed-Hankel/Jensen bridge
claims.claim: Prove that the exact all-order signed-Hankel/sign-consistency structure for A_k(lambda), together with Xi/Phi-specific analytic hypotheses, implies all-degree/all-shift Jensen hyperbolicity, Laguerre-Polya membership, or Lambda <= 0.
claims.current_blocker: Finite shifted-principal signed-Hankel certificates, the finite unshifted reshaped-Hankel Arb certificate, and finite Jensen passes do not imply the all-order bridge; the exact degree-3 algebra gate passes finite reshaped signs while breaking cubic Jensen hyperbolicity.
claims.required_upgrade: All-order shifted reshaped-Hankel sign consistency for the actual A_k(lambda), plus a signed/indefinite total-positivity or Xi-specific theorem converting that structure into all-degree/all-shift Jensen hyperbolicity.
claims.proof_boundary: Open theorem target; not currently proved.

claims.title: Theorem Target B2: Jensen-window PF bridge
claims.claim: Prove that every binomially weighted Jensen window B^{d,n,0}_j=binom(d,j) A_{n+j}(0) is finite PF-infinity, or prove this from all-order shifted reshaped-Hankel sign consistency plus Xi/Phi-specific analytic hypotheses.
claims.current_blocker: The degree-2 signed-Hankel identity only controls quadratic Jensen windows, while the exact degree-3 algebra gate shows low-order finite reshaped signs can hold even when cubic Jensen hyperbolicity fails.
claims.required_upgrade: A noncircular all-degree/all-shift theorem converting the actual A_k(0) sign-regularity structure into total nonnegativity of every binomially weighted Jensen-window Toeplitz matrix.
claims.proof_boundary: Open theorem target; not currently proved.

claims.title: Theorem Target A: direct coefficient PF-infinity
claims.claim: Prove all Toeplitz minors of c_k(0)=mu_{2k}(0)/(2k)! are nonnegative.
claims.current_blocker: Finite Toeplitz/PF certificates do not imply all-order PF-infinity.
claims.required_upgrade: All-order determinant positivity proof, positive structural theorem, or verified external theorem applying exactly to c_k.
claims.proof_boundary: Open theorem target; not currently proved.

claims.title: Theorem Target D: positive Schur specialization
claims.claim: Construct a positive Schur/Edrei-Thoma specialization h_k -> d_k(0), or an equivalent planar-network, production-matrix, continued-fraction, or positive determinant-integral proof.
claims.current_blocker: No positive specialization, planar network, or production matrix is known for the zeta heat-flow coefficients.
claims.required_upgrade: Independent construction proving Schur positivity before any appeal to ASW/Edrei.
claims.proof_boundary: Open theorem target; exact reindexing is validated but positivity is not proved.

claims.title: Theorem Target C: positive determinant integral formula
claims.claim: Derive a manifestly nonnegative integral representation for every structurally nonzero Toeplitz minor.
claims.current_blocker: No positive integrand W_{R,Q,lambda} is known.
claims.required_upgrade: Cauchy-Binet, Andreief, Karlin-style, or equivalent positive determinant identity.
claims.proof_boundary: Open theorem target; not currently proved.

claims.title: Theorem Target F: all-order Edrei log-power representation
claims.claim: Prove the all-order positive zero-parameter representation for H_0 via Edrei log-power sums.
claims.current_blocker: Finite log-sign, finite power-Hankel, and finite recurrence positivity are only necessary diagnostics.
claims.required_upgrade: All-n proof, positive parameter construction, and analytic convergence/product reconstruction.
claims.proof_boundary: Open theorem target; not currently proved.

claims.title: finite prefix promotion is invalid
claims.claim: Finite coefficient prefixes, finite signed-Hankel grids, finite Jensen passes, or finite recurrence data cannot be promoted to all-order theorem conclusions by wording alone.
claims.proof_boundary: Rejected proof step; executable countermodel gates validate the obstruction.

claims.title: core proof-programme reproducibility gates
claims.claim: The core runner validates the promoted ledgers, non-promotion guards, algebraic reindexing, language boundaries, status manifest, and reference integrity.
claims.proof_boundary: Reproducibility and proof-safety hygiene only; not a proof bridge.
